top3.sql:
SELECT Birthday 
FROM Patient 
WHERE ID IN (
    SELECT ID 
    FROM Laboratory 
    WHERE GLU != 'Normal'
) 
ORDER BY Birthday ASC 
LIMIT 1;

SELECT Birthday 
FROM Patient 
WHERE ID IN (
    SELECT ID 
    FROM Laboratory 
    WHERE GLU != 'Normal'
) 
ORDER BY Birthday ASC 
LIMIT 1;

SELECT Birthday 
FROM Patient 
WHERE ID IN (
    SELECT Laboratory.ID 
    FROM Laboratory 
    JOIN Patient ON Laboratory.ID = Patient.ID 
    WHERE Laboratory.GLU != 'Normal'
) 
ORDER BY Birthday ASC 
LIMIT 1;

SELECT Birthday 
FROM Patient 
WHERE ID IN (
    SELECT ID 
    FROM Laboratory 
    WHERE GLU != 'Normal'
) 
ORDER BY Birthday DESC 
LIMIT 1;

FROM Patient 
WHERE ID IN (

    WHERE GLU != 'Normal'
) 
ORDER BY Birthday ASC 
LIMIT 1;

FROM Patient 
WHERE ID IN (
    SELECT Laboratory.ID 
    FROM Laboratory 
    JOIN Patient ON Laboratory.ID = Patient.ID 
    WHERE Laboratory.GLU != 'Normal'
) 
ORDER BY Birthday ASC 
LIMIT 1;

SELECT Birthday 
FROM Patient 
WHERE ID IN (
    SELECT ID 
    FROM Laboratory 
    WHERE GLU != 'Normal'
) 
ORDER BY Birthday DESC 
LIMIT 1;

final.sql:
SELECT Birthday 
FROM Patient 
WHERE ID IN (
    SELECT ID 
    FROM Laboratory 
    WHERE GLU != 'Normal'
) 
ORDER BY Birthday ASC 
LIMIT 1;
